```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Reported hate crimes in California increased by 32.6% from 2020 to 2021.",
    "The overall reported hate crimes in California are at their highest reported level since 2001.",
    "There has been a 177.5% increase in reported anti-Asian hate crimes.",
    "Hate crimes targeting the Black and API communities increased significantly over a one-year period.",
    "For every reported hate crime, there are hundreds of unreported incidents of hate-based harassment and violence.",
    "The increase in hate crimes is associated with the pandemic.",
    "Reported hate crime levels in California have not been this high since the aftermath of the terrorist attacks of September 11.",
    "The California Department of Justice defines hate crimes based on characteristics such as disability, gender, nationality, race or ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, or association with someone with these characteristics.",
    "The Public Transit Ridership Safety bill (SB 1161) aims to address harassment on public transportation.",
    "Transit agency staff will be trained to legally respond to incidents of harassment, including hate crimes, on public transportation.",
    "AB 2448 requires large businesses to train employees on how to protect against, report, and respond to hate crimes."
  ]
}
```
